title: Export Board Summary, and include Group By

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When you export a filtered view that uses Group by, what you get in the export is not the same as what you see in your board. It defaults to the groups in the main table. Another great thing would be to only export summaries of each Group by Group. This would be amazing for reporting billables and non billables for invoicing, as you would get a 1 line output per billable item, despite having multiple timelogs over the month for that item.

What are you trying to achieve

Quicker invoicing, and reduction of human error risk when extracting data from a board for invoicing clients.
